title: polemonium caeruleum subsp. kiushianum
intro: Polemonium caeruleum subsp. kiushianum, also known as Japanese Jacob's Ladder, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects, derived from its alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Japanese Jacob's Ladder can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for its herbal uses, and it is often used in traditional medicine in East Asia.
